name: retold-remote
description: Retold Remote - NAS media browser with gallery views and keyboard navigation

scripts.build: npx quack build && npx quack copy
scripts.coverage: npx nyc --reporter=lcov --reporter=text-lcov npx mocha -- -u tdd -R spec

retoldBeacon.description: NAS media browser with gallery views and keyboard navigation; serves a content folder over HTTP and registers as a beacon.

Fields.Name: HostContentPath
Fields.Label: Host folder to serve
Fields.Help: Absolute path on the host whose contents will be served; bind-mounted read-only into the container at /app/content.

author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>

brand.Name: Retold Remote
brand.Tagline: Browse, view, and curate media on your NAS
brand.Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-retold-remote-filled-light">
				<path d="M 2 48
			C 2 18.0222416, 18.0222416 2, 48 2
			C 77.9777584 2, 94 18.0222416, 94 48
			C 94 77.9777584, 77.9777584 94, 48 94
			C 18.0222416 94, 2 77.9777584, 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			C 2 18.0222416, 18.0222416 2, 48 2
			C 77.9777584 2, 94 18.0222416, 94 48
			C 94 77.9777584, 77.9777584 94, 48 94
			C 18.0222416 94, 2 77.9777584, 2 48 Z" fill="#aa38cf"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-retold-remote-filled-light)"><rect x="20" y="20" width="56" height="56" rx="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/>
					<path d="M 48 30 L 70 48 L 48 66 L 26 48 Z" fill="#df3f7f"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="38" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">RR</text>
	</svg>
